products.name: Software Command & Control
products.descriptor: Multi-vehicle C2 software for autonomous and manned-unmanned teaming

evidence.snippet:
For software licensing and packaging contact [sales@autonodyne.com](mailto:sales@autonodyne.com?)
### Software for your Unmanned Vehicles
Autonodyne software has been integrated on more than 60 makes/models of unmanned platforms. Enabling support for 15 communication protocols, 16 datalink radios, and the ability to host the software on multiple hardware platforms.

products.name: Autonomy Behaviors
products.descriptor: Library of named autonomous behavior modules for air, sea, and land UxVs

evidence.snippet:
### Autonomy Behaviors
Autonodyne’s library of software behaviors permits your vehicle or team of vehicles to perform a variety of mission-specific maneuvers autonomously.
For a complete inventory of our behaviors see [Autonomy Behaviors.](/autonomy-behaviors)

products.name: Counter UAS & Red-Teaming Services
products.descriptor: Counter-UAS testing, training, and red-team adversary services using Autonodyne autonomy software

evidence.snippet:
Testing of 3rd-party counter-UAS systems, training aids for organizations preparing for deployment, testing detection and tracking systems, identifying gaps, hardening protection of high value assets, etc.
#### Counter UAS & Red-Teaming Services
